case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MAURIZIO ERNESTO GIGOLA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GIGOLA, MAURIZIO ERNESTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAURIZIO ERNESTO GIGOLA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
